strengths: 16+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Founded and sustains GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform — demonstrates entrepreneurial/builder mindset
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research — AI experience limited to recent tooling work
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; no evidence of recognized AI expertise or thought leadership
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC at small-to-mid companies, not director-level principal influence at scale

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI expertise and shipped AI products
Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: The role demands recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products, principal-level strategic influence, and cloud/AI builder fluency. The candidate shows strong, broad engineering craftsmanship (TDD, polyglot, 16+ years) and entrepreneurial traits via GISCollective, but AI evidence is thin — only a recent mention of MCP and agentic tooling at re:cinq, with no shipped AI platforms, publications, or advanced AI degree. Cloud work is limited to AWS CDK usage rather than platform-level strategy. Experience level meets the 15-year minimum, but principal/director-IC scope and AI authority are not demonstrated.
